titleFormatted.en: Cannot reach setpoint — off by at least [[delta]]°C in the wrong direction
titleFormatted.nl: Kan setpoint niet bereiken — minstens [[delta]]°C in de verkeerde richting

hint.en:
MODE-AWARE. Fires when the room temperature is at least [delta]°C off the setpoint in the direction the HVAC is failing.

• In HEATING mode: fires when the room is colder than (setpoint − delta).
• In COOLING mode: fires when the room is warmer than (setpoint + delta).
• In AUTO / OFF: does NOT fire (unclear which direction is 'wrong').

Typical use: trigger 'Turn boost on' when the HVAC is falling behind, regardless of season.
hint.nl:
MODUS-AFHANKELIJK. Activeert wanneer de kamertemperatuur minstens [delta]°C naast het setpoint zit in de richting waarin de HVAC faalt.

• In VERWARMEN: activeert wanneer kamer kouder is dan (setpoint − delta).
• In KOELEN: activeert wanneer kamer warmer is dan (setpoint + delta).
• In AUTO / UIT: activeert NIET.
